title.en: The Tricky Wood Red Dragon was extremely fright...

content.en:
"How does this guy cultivate?"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon was extremely frightened, how difficult it was for the Fourth Realm to break through to the Fifth Realm, on the other side of the Four Thousand Realm, it was only the last Multidimensional Tribulation that gave birth to a Fifth Realm, but Ye Tian actually broke through to the Fifth Realm directly during the Non-Multidimensional Tribulation, which was really too demonic.

Among the Chiyan Dragon Clan who came this time, there was no existence of the Fifth Realm, and these Chiyan Dragon Clans of the Fourth Realm were extremely respectful when they saw Ye Tian.

"This place of inheritance of the lord of the Wumu Realm, this seat is wanted!"

Ye Tian said.

These Fourth Realms of the Red Flame Dragon Clan didn't know what to say for a while, but they knew very well that their high-level would definitely not leave it at that.

You must know that the strength of the Red Flame Dragon Clan is extremely strong, but it is very low-key, they also have a fifth realm, and there is more than one, among the extradimensional creatures, "Seven Six Zero" can be ranked in the top three.

In their opinion, Ye Tian was only in the early stage of the Fifth Realm, and the Red Flame Dragon Clan would definitely not give up this place of inheritance of the Lord of the Black Mother Realm.

Then.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon messaged: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, the Red Flame Dragon Clan will not give up here, there is more than one Fifth Realm in the clan, and some have even lived many multi-dimensional tribulations. "

His original intention was to make Ye Tian give up here, so as not to be suppressed by the Red Flame Dragon Clan.

However, Ye Tian said directly: "Tricky Wood Red Dragon, I'm not afraid of the Red Flame Dragon Clan. "

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon still wanted to persuade him, but the other Red Flame Dragon clansmen urged him to leave.

Soon, these Red Flame Dragons left.

Ye Tian also knew that it would not be long before these Red Flame Dragon Clans would invite the existence of the Fifth Realm.

But, so what?

There are a lot of resources in a place where the Lord of the Black Mother Realm inherits, and he will not give it up, even if it is useless for him in the future, it is also an unimaginable resource for the human race.

Moreover, he wants to control this territory and not allow other forces to set foot here.

......

Soon after, these Red Flame Dragon Clan returned to the clan and told the Fifth Realm of the Red Flame Dragon Clan about the matter.

Soon.

A Red Flame Dragon Clan in the late stage of the Fifth Realm has come out.

"Red Ancestor!"

A large number of Fourth Realms greeted him.

After the Red Demon Realm Lord exited the customs, he immediately went to the 6611th Territory.

When the Tricky Wood Red Dragon learned that the Red Demon Ancestor was out of the customs, he also sighed.

He knew very well the strength of this Red Ancestor, he had lived for seventeen multi-dimensional tribulation times, and his strength was extremely terrifying, Ye Tian, a fifth realm that had just been promoted, could not be an opponent!

Ye Tian finally rescued him, the relationship was okay, he naturally didn't want Ye Tian to be killed.

......

The speed of the fifth realm is extremely fast, and it can rush through the dimensional void.

It didn't take long for the Crimson Realm Lord to arrive at the Territory of Six Thousand Six Hundred and Eleven.

Then.

Ye Tian's gaze locked on the arriving Red Demon Realm Lord.

"Sure enough, you have just broken through the fifth realm, you are very good, you can break through the fifth realm during this period, it seems that you also know that the multi-dimensional catastrophe of death is coming, and you desperately hit the fifth realm, and you succeeded. "

"You can become the fifth realm, your luck should still be good, if you leave like this, I can not make a move on you!"

The Red Demon Realm Lord said coldly.

"Lord of the Crimson Realm, this place has been occupied by me, please leave. "

Ye Tian expelled the way.

"Look for death!"

The Crimson Realm Lord was furious.

He was a late-stage powerhouse of the Fifth Realm who had lived for seventeen multi-dimensional tribulations, Ye Tian dared to be so rude to him, just a Fifth Realm who had just been promoted, he could be pinched to death casually.

Rumble!!!!

The Lord of the Red Demon Realm directly urged a dimensional rule, broke out the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Technique, and the soul will surged, casting a Tenth Dimensional Will Peerless Technique.

It can be said that the strength of the Red Demon Realm Lord is enough to easily kill the ordinary Fifth Realm in an instant.

But in the next second, he was horrified.

"Double Dimension Rule!"

In an instant, the Red Demon Realm Lord's one-dimensional rules were crushed, and a terrifying blade shattered many of his defenses, as well as his soul will attacks.

This is the supreme mastery, attacking both the physical body and the soul will.

Under the blow, the body of the Red Demon Realm Lord was pierced, and the bloodline in his body was cut off.

"Run!"

He immediately retreated into the tenth dimension.

Ye Tian was able to kill the Red Flame Realm Lord, but he didn't do so, there was no point in killing a Red Evil Realm Lord, besides, there must be a more powerful Fifth Realm among the Red Flame Dragon Clan, there was no need for him to fight the Red Flame Dragon Clan.......

This time it hit the Red Demon Realm Lord hard, which was enough to make the Red Flame Dragon Clan jealous of him and not dare to come again.

......

Red Flame Dragons.

The Crimson Realm Lord returned, covered in injuries, and the other Fifth Realms appeared, immediately coming to heal the Crimson Realm Lord's injuries.

However, the power of the multi-dimensional blade is too terrifying, containing the power of the rules of the two dimensions, and it is difficult to get rid of it for a while.

Subsequently, the oldest statue in the clan made a move, which only gradually stripped away the supreme peerless power in the main body of the Red Demon Realm.

"Don't allow offending that Ye Tian Realm Lord!"

This is a warning from the strongest of the Red Flame Dragon Clan.

In fact, the Red Demon Realm Lord also guessed Ye Tian's identity, which must be the Fourth Realm who had captured the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pagoda.

It's just that they didn't expect that as soon as Ye Tian broke through the fifth realm, he would comprehend the rules of the double dimension, fusing two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and his strength would be so terrifying.

This is already the top Fifth Realm combat power, with the Thirteen Tribulations Innate Multi-Dimensional Supreme Treasure Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, who can kill Ye Tian, it is estimated that there are only a few of them, but it is impossible for those few to kill Ye Tian for no reason, in case Ye Tian escapes, it will bring disaster to his own forces and family.

In other words, Ye Tian has already risen, even if it is exposed, nothing will happen.

Soon.

The news spread that the Lord of the Crimson Realm had been severely damaged.

The Tricky Wood Red 1.1 Dragon was stunned when he heard this, he never expected that the Red Demon Ancestor was severely injured by Ye Tian, what kind of strength is this.

"The gap is getting bigger and bigger!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon sighed.

Moreover, he also knew that after this incident, the little friendship between him and Ye Tian would be gone.

......

Since the incident of the Red Flame Dragon Clan, more than two million extradimensional epochs have passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

Ye Tian's dimensional rules broke through again.

Rumble!

A three-dimensional void appeared behind him, which meant that he had comprehended the rules of the three dimensions.

In an instant, the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, the Wu Mu Body, and the Ten Dimensional Celestial Bodies all fused into the dimensional body, and the strength of his body skyrocketed.

Moreover, he can cultivate other innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and there is a three-black secret method, so there will be no rejection.
